content: Resend webhooks are delivered via Svix infrastructure. Event type for hard bounce is 'email.bounced'. Payload: { type: 'email.bounced', created_at: ISO8601, data: { email_id, from, to[], subject, bounce: { message, subType: 'Suppressed'|'General'|'NoEmail', type: 'Permanent' } } }. Soft bounce uses 'email.delivery_delayed'. Verification requires the 'svix' npm package (v1.96.1): import { Webhook } from 'svix'; wh.verify(rawBody, { 'svix-id', 'svix-timestamp', 'svix-signature' }). CRITICAL: must read request.text() NOT request.json() before verifying — re-serialization breaks the HMAC. Resend also exposes resend.webhooks.verify() in their SDK as a convenience wrapper.
